Litton would be livid with himself. He had just struck a six and tries to hit another, walks across to access the leg-side field but Hardik smartly takes pace off, Litton cannot control the pull and hits it over square leg, SKY runs in and takes a good catch. Never easy with these catches with the wind blowing strongly.
